info.title: Aimtell API
info.description: Aimtell is a platform that enables you to re-engage website visitors with highly targeted browser push notifications. Manage campaigns, subscribers, segments, and analytics.

get.description: Get analytics data aggregated across all sites.
Get analytics data for a specific site.

post.description: Send a one-off push notification to subscribers.
Create a new manual push campaign.

get.description: Get results for a manual campaign by day.
Get click data for a manual campaign.

post.description: Create a new event triggered campaign.
Track a custom attribute for a subscriber.
